calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua West appeared by zoom for and with Grace Faber by zoom and Rory Faber by zoom (administrators).

The court stated that it got the response to the probate examiner's notes regarding the brothers' assignments of the estate to Grace and them being advised of their rights to seek counsel, and that the response also addressed the notice issue. The court waives any defect in notice. The First and Final Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
